## ⚠️ DO NOT SUBMIT PULL REQUESTS TO THIS REPOSITORY

Thank you for your interest! However, this repository is a **distribution-only mirror**. 

All SDK code is centrally managed and generated in our private internal monorepo. Because of this, **direct Pull Requests in this repository cannot be merged** and will be automatically closed.

### How to Contribute Instead:

1. **Close this Pull Request.**
2. **[Open an Issue](issues)** in this repository describing the fix or feature you intended to contribute.
3. Our team will review your feedback and implement the changes in our internal source, which will then be synchronized back to this repository in a future release.

*We appreciate your help in making Alogram SDKs better!*
